fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company located at the address.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you do business with this vendor at this address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number that is associated with the remit address.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if this address is used by default for this vendor. Only one address can be set as the default.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fax number associated with the remit address.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address associated with the remit address.
